channel.title: Occam Engineering Blog
channel.description: Notes on extraction, token budgets, and honest tooling.

item.title: Why we rewrote the scheduler
item.description: Moving from a global lock to per-shard work stealing.

item.title: Measuring compression honestly
item.description: The only metric that matters is the byte ratio on a real corpus.

item.title: A field guide to failure codes
item.description: ok:false means unknown — never guess the content.
